tasks.title: Create the task list page 123
tasks.description: Build a page that displays tasks with title, status, priority, assignee, and due date.
tasks.details: Use Nuxt UI's table component to display task information. The page should include sorting, filtering, pagination, and a search field.
acceptanceCriteria: Tasks are displayed in a table
Users can sort by due date

tasks.title: Implement task creation form
tasks.description: Create a form that allows users to add a new task to the application.
tasks.details: The form should contain fields for title, description, status, priority, assignee, category, tags, due date, and estimated hours.
acceptanceCriteria: The task is saved through the mock API

tasks.title: Add task status filtering
tasks.description: Allow users to filter tasks by Pending, In Progress, or Done status.
tasks.details: Add a status filter above the task table. Users should also be able to clear the selected status and return to the full task list.
acceptanceCriteria: The active filter is visually clear

tasks.title: Build the task details page
tasks.description: Create a dedicated page for viewing all information related to a selected task.
tasks.details: Create a dynamic Nuxt route using the task ID. The page should display task metadata, progress, assignee information, acceptance criteria, attachments, and comments.
acceptanceCriteria: The page uses a dynamic route
Task information is fetched by ID
A not-found state is displayed for invalid IDs
The page includes an edit action

tasks.title: Implement task editing
tasks.description: Allow users to update the fields of an existing task.
tasks.details: Reuse the task form for editing. Load the existing task data, submit only the changed values, and update the task through a PATCH request.
acceptanceCriteria: Existing data is loaded into the form
Changes are saved using a PATCH request
The user is redirected after saving

tasks.title: Add delete task confirmation
tasks.description: Add the ability to delete a task after confirming the action.
tasks.details: Display a confirmation modal before deleting a task. The modal should include the task title and clearly explain that the action cannot be undone.
acceptanceCriteria: The modal includes the task title
The task list refreshes after deletion

tasks.title: Create reusable status badge
tasks.description: Build a reusable component for displaying task statuses consistently.
tasks.details: Create a status badge that maps each task status to an appropriate label, icon, and Nuxt UI color.
acceptanceCriteria: Pending, In Progress, and Done are supported
Each status has a distinct appearance

tasks.title: Handle loading and error states
tasks.description: Add proper feedback while API requests are loading or when they fail.
tasks.details: Display skeleton rows while loading tasks. Show a retryable error state when the request fails and an empty state when no tasks are available.
acceptanceCriteria: A skeleton is displayed during loading
An error message is displayed on failure
An empty state is shown when no tasks exist

tasks.title: Add task search
tasks.description: Allow users to search for tasks by title or description.
tasks.details: Add a debounced search input above the task list. The search should match both task titles and task descriptions.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can clear the search input

tasks.title: Add overdue task indicators
tasks.description: Visually identify tasks whose due date has passed and are not completed.
tasks.details: A task should be considered overdue when its due date is before today and its status is not Done.
acceptanceCriteria: Done tasks are never marked overdue
The overdue state is calculated from the due date

tasks.title: Write project documentation
tasks.description: Document the project setup, architecture, available features, and development commands.
tasks.details: The README should explain how to install dependencies, start Nuxt and JSON Server, build the project, and understand the project structure.
